summary: Tested two new features: 1) Student cursive greeting and 2) Teacher Review Mode. Both features are working correctly. Student greeting shows 'Hi Krutika, Which subject do you want to study today?' in Dancing Script cursive font with gradient colors. Teacher Review Mode allows teachers to view submissions, see AI evaluation details, override marks, add comments, and save reviews.
